creator: otis@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, do the following:

- Create an UPDATING entry stating that recursor.yml is now the only supported config format (file) and mention the way how to create it from the old .conf file.
- Do this also in pkg-message for upgrading

Optionally: Do not install recursor.yml from within the package, install only the sample file. rc script could have an extra command to check for presence of recursor.yml and if it does not exist, then that extra command could do rec_control show-yml ... (provided that recursor.conf does exist).
